tasks.title: Scaffold Beta Environment
tasks.description: Create the new decoupled folder structure inside /beta_build.

tasks.title: Migrate World & Player State to Pydantic
tasks.description: Refactor character sheets, inventory, and scene logic into strict Pydantic models for validation and LLM compatibility.

tasks.title: Asynchronous LLM Wrapper
tasks.description: Wrap the existing llama-cpp-python logic in a dedicated QThread or asyncio task to prevent main thread blocking.

tasks.title: Decouple STT/TTS
tasks.description: Move pyttsx3 and speech_recognition into background workers. Set up signals to communicate speech start/stop events to the UI.

tasks.title: Integrate qasync
tasks.description: Port the polling-based PyQt loop to qasync. Remove scene_state.json dependency and wire the UI directly to the Core Engine's state signals.

tasks.title: Implement Vector DB for Memory
tasks.description: Set up ChromaDB/FAISS to store generated narrative chunks. Implement RAG logic to query past events before LLM generation.
